takes.strong a tiny island near singapore has: Russian oil rerouting adds to global supply glut, keeping prices under pressure.
takes.u s intensifies strikes on iran s coast: Escalated US strikes near Hormuz raise war premium but fail to lift prices.
takes.strait of hormuz is the center of gravit: Iran's strategic reliance on Hormuz underscores potential for conflict-driven price spikes.
takes.iran war latest explosions reported acro: Explosions and tensions in Iran highlight risks but fail to offset oversupply drag.
